inputs.label: Pipe Internal Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Internal diameter of the pipe used for gas flow.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal diameter of the pipe used for gas flow.

businessContext_i18n.de: Innendurchmesser des für den Gasfluss verwendeten Rohrs.

inputs.businessContext: Total length of the pipe segment.

inputs.businessContext: Absolute pressure at the pipe inlet.

businessContext_i18n.es: Presión absoluta en la entrada de la tubería.

inputs.businessContext: Absolute pressure at the pipe outlet.

inputs.businessContext: Average gas temperature inside the pipe.

inputs.label: Specific Gravity (dimensionless)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of gas density to air density at standard conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of gas density to air density at standard conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz yoğunluğunun standart koşullardaki hava yoğunluğuna oranı.
